creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Hi noway,

The port does not result in the conflict you describe.

If a user has LibreSSL installed, acme-client will link against libtls from the port. This is when you would have a conflict.

If LibreSSL is not installed (or set using DEFAULT_VERSIONS), the acme-client port will only `stage' the build (in WRKSRC) and link the libtls library statically. As the LibreSSL port is not installed, this does not lead to the conflict you describe.

Hope this explains it for you, let me know otherwise.
